Label: REQ-1 (3.1.3)
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of torrent sites that can be queried simultaneously
Correction: The system shall query a maximum of 10 torrent sites simultaneously to ensure optimal performance.

Label: REQ-4 (3.1.3)
Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying the date posted
Correction: The system shall display the date posted in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

Label: REQ-5 (3.1.3)
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the search term is invalid or empty
Correction: The system shall display a message "Please enter a valid search term" if the search term is invalid or empty.

Label: REQ-2 (3.2.3)
Issue: Does not specify the frequency of database updates for video hosting and linking sites
Correction: The system shall update the database of video hosting and linking sites weekly.

Label: REQ-5 (3.2.3)
Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying the length of the video
Correction: The system shall display the length of the video in the format HH:MM:SS.

Label: REQ-7 (3.2.3)
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the search term is invalid or empty
Correction: The system shall display a message "Please enter a valid search term" if the search term is invalid or empty.

Issue: Does not specify the supported screen resolutions for the user interface
Correction: The system shall support screen resolutions of 1024x768 and higher.

Issue: Does not specify the supported web browsers for hyperlinks
Correction: The system shall support hyperlinks in the following web browsers: Internet Explorer, Firefox, Safari, and Chrome.

Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for torrent results
Correction: The system shall not display torrent results with a file size greater than 10 GB.

Issue: Does not specify the criteria for identifying illegal or harmful content
Correction: The system shall use a predefined list of keywords and URLs to identify and block illegal or harmful content.

Issue: Does not specify the method for ensuring data privacy
Correction: The system shall use encryption to ensure the privacy of any user data transmitted.

Issue: Does not specify the legal jurisdictions considered for compliance
Correction: The system shall comply with legal requirements in the United States and the European Union.

Label: Glossary
Issue: Does not define the term "BitTorrent client"
Correction: A BitTorrent client is a software application that implements the BitTorrent protocol for peer-to-peer file sharing.
